description: Audit the current Ink TUI against TERMINAL_DESIGN.md and create enforceable design/parity guardrails before renderer implementation.

userStories.title: Capture current TUI visual audit artifacts
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want actual PTY output for the current TUI so that design failures are grounded in what users see.
acceptanceCriteria: Run pibo debug pty scenarios for startup, owner/room picker, slash suggestions, /status, existing transcript, and a running/streaming row where feasible
Each scenario writes raw.ansi.log, clean.txt, screen.txt, metadata.json, input/assertion data where supported, and records exact command invocations
Audit report under docs/reports/ink-cli-terminal-rendering-parity-* links every artifact directory and states whether each path was real/default, mocked, fake, or demo

Audit explicitly compares output to TERMINAL_DESIGN.md sections: transcript-first layout, row density, color-as-signal, monospace hierarchy, prefix glyphs, detail panels, status bar, badges, rows, and command output
Audit identifies which visible elements are transcript rows, overlays, chrome, or invalid detached messages
Focused PTY/audit script checks pass
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Codify non-negotiable terminal design rules
userStories.description: As an implementer, I want exact pass/fail design rules so that shared data cannot be mistaken for visual parity.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or update docs/specs/changes/ink-cli-terminal-rendering-parity documentation with mandatory rules: transcript is primary, command/runtime results are chronological rows, overlays are temporary, chrome is compact, rows are dense, and secrets are redacted before rendering
Document allowed renderer differences: Ink may use ASCII/ANSI/progress text; Web may use DOM/Tailwind/icons; both must preserve order, labels, tones, statuses, and semantics
Document forbidden outcomes: dashboard-style status dumps, top-heavy suggestions, dominant long UUIDs, unbounded JSON, permanent action chrome, and parity claims based only on shared model imports

Document state.message policy: allowed only for ephemeral guidance, picker hints, cancellations, and non-history empty states; forbidden for command outputs, runtime state, command errors, and trace results
Traceability table maps every design rule to at least one later PRD/story or validation gate
Docs review checklist is concrete enough that a reviewer can mark each rule pass/fail without guessing
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add static renderer-boundary guardrails
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want automated guardrails that keep Web, Ink, and shared models separated while preserving semantic parity.
acceptanceCriteria: Static tests prove src/session-ui imports no React, Ink, DOM, browser APIs, CSS, Web component files, Tailwind, or lucide packages
Static tests prove src/apps/cli-ui imports no Web Compact Terminal DOM components, Tailwind CSS, lucide-react, browser-only APIs, or chat-ui component files
Static/source tests fail when supported status/model/login/thinking/tool/error rendering bypasses shared row/card descriptors without an explicit documented exception
Boundary tests include a regression fixture with a secret-bearing value and assert redaction occurs before renderer-specific output
Focused static boundary tests pass
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create audit-backed implementation gate for future stories
userStories.description: As a Ralph agent, I want a mandatory completion gate so that visual TUI stories cannot pass without real screen evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a reusable checklist or report template requiring design-rule status, PTY command, artifact directory, observed screen result, and remaining gaps for each user-facing TUI story
Checklist requires PTY evidence for rendering, overlay, picker, status, slash-palette, streaming, and command-result changes when feasible
Checklist states fake/demo/mocked tests are supporting evidence and cannot be the final default-path evidence when a local real/default path is available
Checklist requires installed/global pibo tui:sessions validation before final parity completion
README PRD catalog points Ralph agents to this gate before implementing PRDs 02-07
Focused docs or unit checks pass where available
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification
Typecheck passes
